hall_of_fame.title: Add upcoming GPT-3 model
hall_of_fame.one_line_why: GPT-3's massive success and widespread adoption make its integration crucial for the Transformers library.

hall_of_fame.title: DaemonSet dynamic/scaled resources based on node type
hall_of_fame.one_line_why: Dynamic resource allocation for DaemonSets is crucial for efficient utilization of diverse node environments in modern Kubernetes clusters.

hall_of_fame.title: Partial/Progressive Configuration Changes
hall_of_fame.one_line_why: Partial configuration changes succeed now due to advancements in Terraform's provider protocol and improved planning and apply phases.

last_resurrection.title: feat: Support new Image Generation base64 with OpenRouter
last_resurrection.one_line_why: The integration became feasible due to advancements in API integration and AI model support.
